summary: Base W8 — scheduled −30% deload (~14 mpw) and the first week under the v4.3 mileage reshape (peak 38→28 mpw; all quality preserved, Adj #67). Run volume cut, quality held: the 3×6 @ T (the only hard run) sits Wed this week after a one-week Tue↔Wed swap (Hyp A → Tue 6/9); Mon/Thu easy, Fri easy + strides, Sat 45 min long. Two reactive tendons drive the posture — L Achilles AM-stiff (Adj #63), R patellar (Adj #64): lean into the deload, Vomero on all easy/long runs, hill strides held (Adj #44), and HOLD the W9 step-up until BOTH tendons read AM-clean (Adj #65/#67 reopen at the W8→W9 boundary). Lifts unchanged in schedule but the 2026-06-08 audit (Adj #68/#69) lands this week: side delts / biceps / triceps move to the growth band (Wed DB lat→6, preacher/pushdown→4 each), Sat side-delt now DB lateral (load to establish, Adj #69), abs now decline crunch BW (Adj #66), Sat DB flye cut. Incline AMRAP/TM re-test DONE Tue: 135×10 RIR 0 → e1RM 180, new TM 162 (was 165); 145 repeat (miss #1, Adj #47) resumes W9 Wed. NEW Tue: pushdown swapped to UNILATERAL cable across the board (bilateral aggravated the lateral elbow, §10.A clock reset — Adj #74/#75); AM tendon reads: Tue = L Achilles a bit sore (NOT AM-clean), R knee clean (Adj #76); Wed = ALL GREEN incl. the first AM-clean Achilles of the deload — calf 335 / hill-stride / W9 step-up holds persist until the Sun 6/14 boundary check.

days.note: Logged — 30 min, treadmill 1%, 10:45/mi (Z1 ceiling), cadence 168, HR avg 160/peak 168. SI clean; L Achilles pain-free during, R knee quiet (first no-signal read since #63) — AM read not given, holds persist (Adj #70).

Logged — Incline AMRAP re-test 135×10 RIR 0 → e1RM 180, new TM 162 (Adj #71); DB lat first 6-set dose @ 30 held (#72); preacher 60 hold persists, set 3 RIR 0 (#73); pushdown SWAPPED to unilateral cable 20/arm, clean, bump-eligible pain-gated (#74, elbow #75); crunch BW holds; rear-delt 125 clean. L Achilles NOT AM-clean, R knee clean (#76).

Threshold pushed here by the Tue↔Wed swap. Run-only. Hold 8:00/mi (confirmed legit T, Adj #26; ran quick W7 = may have room, watch but don't recalibrate before W12). Default §2.A ordering resumes W9 (Adj #53). Wed AM read ALL GREEN — SI clean, first AM-clean L Achilles of the deload, R knee clean, no elbow flare; holds still resolve at the Sun 6/14 boundary (Adj #65/#76).
Recovery aerobic (trimmed, deload). Revert to rest on a yellow/red AM (§11.C). Vomero, flat, easy.
Deload — no VO2max yet (Base). Flat strides only (hill strides held, Adj #44); carry the cadence cap (≤180 spm, ~6:00/mi, Adj #25 — nailed clean W7 Fri).

Long trimmed to 45 (deload), flat, Vomero. Hyp B audit (Adj #68/#69): bump lat 155 (#55) + chest-supp row 90 (#56); ESTABLISH new Sat DB lateral ~25–30 (#69); preacher 4×12 @ 60 hold; pushdown now UNILATERAL cable 4×12–15 @ 20/arm, bump-eligible 22.5–25 pain-gated (#74); decline crunch BW 3×10 (new); calf OWED (skipped W7) — keep 325 controlled, 335 still held until AM-clean Achilles (#40/#61); DB flye cut.

Tyler twists 3×15, reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1, daily SI prehab. Walking fine. W8→W9 boundary: recheck BOTH tendons (AM Achilles + R patellar) — clean = W9 step-up proceeds; still reactive = repeat a deload-level week (Adj #65/#67).
